name: cloud-agent-platform
description: Single-user, self-hostable control plane that drives the real interactive Codex CLI and streams its byte-identical terminal to a browser.

scripts.coverage:sandbox: pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-core coverage && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-scheduler coverage && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-lifecycle coverage && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-workspace-git coverage && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-conformance coverage && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-aio-local coverage && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-cloud-http coverage && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-provider-aio coverage && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-provider-boxlite coverage && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox coverage

pnpm.//: pnpm 10 blocks dependency build scripts by default; node-pty needs its node-gyp native build to run, otherwise pty.node is missing at runtime (esp. in the runner Docker image).
